category_sources: source_facts.description says Structure-from-Motion and Multi-View Stereo; official COLMAP docs describe it as an SfM and MVS pipeline.
display_name_sources: Official documentation title and heading use COLMAP in uppercase.
docs_sources: Official COLMAP site is the Sphinx documentation with installation, tutorial, GUI, CLI, and PyCOLMAP pages.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/colmap/colmap; per instruction repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official docs describe SfM, MVS, graphical and command-line interfaces, and reconstruction workflows.
